PT: "How are you managing daily mobility with your new wheelchair?"
Me: "It's been challenging. I recently started using a wheelchair after my accident 3 months ago, and I'm finding that most places I visit regularly aren't accessible."
PT: "What specific barriers are you encountering?"
Me: "Mainly steps and thresholds. My apartment building has two 6-inch steps at the entrance, my parents' home has a raised porch, and my favorite coffee shop has a 4-inch threshold. PT: "Have you considered a portable ramp solution?"
Me: "I'd prefer something aesthetically pleasing in brushed aluminum or carbon fiber that won't look medical. I'm also interested in app-controlled electronic ramps with proximity sensors and weather-resistant materials that integrate with smart home systems."
